heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 796f–6 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this subpart $78,305,000 for fiscal year 2015, $84,353,000 for fiscal year 2016, $86,104,000 for fiscal year 2017, $88,013,000 for fiscal year 2018, $90,083,000 for fiscal year 2019, and $91,992,000 for fiscal year 2020.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 796f–6, , as added , , , authorized appropriations, prior to the general amendment of this subchapter by .Pub. L. 93–112, title VII, § 727Pub.
